feedback.prompt: Did this deck come out right?
feedback.followUpPositive: Glad it came out right. Anything that would make it better?
feedback.placeholderPositive: For example: keep my headings, or add a tag to each card.
feedback.placeholderNegative: For example: images didn't come through, or cards were empty.

ankify.setupHint: Set up your Anki on the Ankify page first
ankify.syncFailedTitle: AnkiWeb didn't accept the sync — open Anki in your browser and sign in to AnkiWeb. {{error}}
ankify.sendingTitle: You're sending {{deck}} to your hosted Anki and AnkiWeb. Takes a moment.

producer.title: Making decks for other people?
producer.body: You've built a lot of decks. If you're making them for students, a class, or customers, we want to hear what would help. There's no product for this yet — we're deciding what to build.

imageDrop.notion_one: {{count}} image couldn't be downloaded and isn't in this deck. The link to it in Notion most likely expired. Convert the page again to try fetching it.
imageDrop.notion_other: {{count}} images couldn't be downloaded and aren't in this deck. The links to them in Notion most likely expired. Convert the page again to try fetching them.
imageDrop.uploadSingleDeck_one: {{count}} image couldn't be downloaded and isn't in this deck. Your file links to it on another site we couldn't reach. Save the image into the file itself, then upload again.
imageDrop.uploadSingleDeck_other: {{count}} images couldn't be downloaded and aren't in this deck. Your file links to them on other sites we couldn't reach. Save the images into the file itself, then upload again.
imageDrop.uploadMultiDeck_one: {{count}} image couldn't be downloaded and isn't in your decks. Your file links to it on another site we couldn't reach. Save the image into the file itself, then upload again.
imageDrop.uploadMultiDeck_other: {{count}} images couldn't be downloaded and aren't in your decks. Your file links to them on other sites we couldn't reach. Save the images into the file itself, then upload again.

truncation.converted: Converted the first {{count}} blocks. The free plan stops there — <pricingLink>upgrade to convert the whole page</pricingLink>.
truncation.subDeckSkipped: Sub-deck rules from toggles, headings, and databases apply on paid plans — this deck converted without them.

columnsGuessed.text: We couldn't tell which columns are the question and answer, so this deck uses <front>{{frontField}}</front> as the front and <back>{{backField}}</back> as the back. Convert the database again to pick different columns.

paywall.headline: One conversion at a time on the free plan
paywall.body: This conversion was paused so the one you already started can finish. Upgrade to Unlimited to run several at once.
paywall.orWaitTitled: Or wait for "<jobTitle>{{title}}</jobTitle>" to finish — started {{time}}.
paywall.orWaitUntitled: Or wait for your current conversion to finish — started {{time}}.

jobs.deleteInProgress: This job is still running. Wait for it to finish.

emptyBack.uploadSingleDeck_one: {{count}} card had no answer and was skipped, so it isn't in this deck. Add a back to it in your file, then convert again.
emptyBack.uploadSingleDeck_other: {{count}} cards had no answer and were skipped, so they aren't in this deck. Add a back to each in your file, then convert again.
emptyBack.uploadMultiDeck_one: {{count}} card had no answer and was skipped, so it isn't in your decks. Add a back to it in your file, then convert again.
emptyBack.uploadMultiDeck_other: {{count}} cards had no answer and were skipped, so they aren't in your decks. Add a back to each in your file, then convert again.
